body:
## Summary

- adds a root `.skills/literature-paper-import` skill for converting arXiv/LaTeX/review-style papers into hosted literature-template sites
- documents the target content shape used by the HCLLM paper example: `/` as the main paper note, `content/<paper-slug>/` as the section tree, and `content/papers/` as the reference-note area
- captures cleanup rules for LaTeX-style refs, backlink hygiene, title/frontmatter policy, graph tags, root-page layout, standalone repo workflow, and validation checks
- updates `.skills/README.md` to list the new documentation-only skill

Closes #4.

## Validation

- `npm run check`
- `npm run build`

comments.body:
The PR is documentation-only: it adds `.skills/literature-paper-import/SKILL.md` and adjusts `.skills/README.md`, closing issue #4. I’m reading that linked issue and the existing skill conventions before assigning scores.

title: docs: add paper import skill
